features.description: Permission previews now neutralize bidi-override, zero-width, and look-alike quote chars so tool inputs can't spoof appr
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed permission previews relayed to chat channels not neutralizing bidirectional-override, zero-width, and look-alike quote characters, so tool inputs cannot visually alter the approval message

features.description: Auto mode no longer overrides a PreToolUse hook's `ask` decision for unsandboxed Bash; hook `ask` now floors at a prompt
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed auto mode overriding a PreToolUse hook's `ask` decision for unsandboxed Bash — a hook `ask` now floors the decision at a prompt

features.description: Nested `.claude/rules/*.md` files no longer load when setting sources exclude project settings.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed nested `.claude/rules/*.md` files loading even when setting sources exclude project settings

features.description: Integer env vars (timeouts, token budgets, retry counts) now accept scientific notation and digit separators like `1e6`,
features.reference_changelog_line: Updated integer environment variables (timeouts, token budgets, retry counts) to accept scientific notation and digit-separator spellings like `1e6` and `64_000`

features.description: "Always allow" permission rules now save at the repo root so worktree approvals persist across sessions and worktrees.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed "always allow" permission rules to save at the repository root, so approvals granted in a git worktree persist across sessions and worktrees

features.description: Added `--forward-subagent-text` flag and env var to include subagent text and thinking in stream-json output.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `--forward-subagent-text` flag and `CLAUDE_CODE_FORWARD_SUBAGENT_TEXT` environment variable to include subagent text and thinking in stream-json output
